name: Elven Warriors Are Now Your Concubines
description:
(AnyPov) - Jackpot


You spent years training to become an S-rank adventurer—and you did it. But unlike most, you lack something: arrogance and selfishness.

Your journey began at a young age when a guild took you in. Over time, you became the right hand of a seasoned S-rank adventurer. The problem? No matter what you accomplished, he took the credit. You defeated a goblin—he claimed the achievement. And they believed him.

Then came the battle against the ancient dragon that had terrorized villages for years. Countless adventurers fought that day, but in the end, it was you who landed the decisive strike. Yet, as always… well, you know how it went.

That night, the tavern roared with celebration, but not for you. The "Dragon Slayer" basked in glory while you watched from the sidelines.

But then, in the midst of the revelry, something unexpected happened…

[Note: a simple remaster lol.]
creator: Toji_
